title: Starlight Cobblemon Pack
description: Custom modpack designed for a pokemon club's private server
body:
# Starlight Cobblemon Pack

The Starlight Cobblemon pack is a modpack designed to be used for a university pokemon club's private server.

The pack is centered around Cobblemon and Create aiming to combine the two mods to create a fun and engaging experience

Explore terrain, catch pokemon, build factories, battle for gym badges and more.

## Extra Information

This modpack contains datapacks that add extra pokemon on top of the base cobblemon mod, please support the original developers if you can.

The gym badge items have custom textures compared to their base mod, The artist Kyemon has granted us a licence to use these updated images for our pack.

Structory is a curseforge mod
you can find the link to it here: 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory

Permission to use is given by the Stardust Labs License:   
https://github.com/Stardust-Labs-MC/license/blob/main/license.txt

The custom origins datapack would not be possible thanks to the amazing help from Mesmaa
